name: Orica Limited
analysis: ORI's 9-SMA is above the 26 and price has reclaimed them. It is coming off a base, 10% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Price has broken above the base high at A$23.6100. RSI has turned up through its signal line. Trade idea: entry A$23.6400, stop A$22.3245, target A$26.0582 (1.84:1) — then trail it.
